name: cyberrangecz-python-commons
documentation:
# Сyberrangecz Python Commons
The repository for common classes of Python-base cyberrangecz projects.

## Common classes
 * **cloud_commons** -- classes used by cyberrangecz cloud clients and [terraform-client](https://github.com/cyberrangecz/backend-terraform-client)

modules.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.exceptions
documentation: Module containing exceptions.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.exceptions.KypoException
documentation: Base exception class for this project. All other exceptions inherit form it.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.exceptions.StackException
documentation: This exception is raised if error occurs within OpenStack API.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.exceptions.StackCreationFailed
documentation: This exception is raised if error occurs while creating stack.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.exceptions.StackNotFound
documentation: This exception is raised if Terraform stack directory is not found.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.exceptions.InvalidTopologyDefinition
documentation: This exception is raised if topology definition cannot be transformed.

variables.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.transformation_configuration.SANDBOX_MAN_CIDR
documentation: 32766 addresses

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_elements.MAN

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_elements.MAN.to_dict
documentation: Return the MAN representation as a dictionary.
Represents Management Access Node in the TI.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_elements.SecurityGroups
documentation: Enumerator for sandboxes OpenStack security groups

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_elements.Link

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_elements.Link.to_dict
documentation: Return the Link representation as a dictionary.
Represents a connection between a virtual machine and a virtual network in the TI.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_elements.NodeToNodeLinkPair
documentation: Represents a connection between two virtual machines over one virtual network in the TI.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_elements.Image
documentation: Used to wrap image parameters.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_elements.Limits
documentation: Used to wrap Absolute Limits of Cloud project

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_elements.Quota
documentation: Used to wrap quotas parameters of resource.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_elements.QuotaSet
documentation: Used to wrap quotas of multiple resources.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_elements.HardwareUsage
documentation: Used to wrap HeatStacks hardware usage.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_elements.NodeDetails
documentation: Defines node (Terraform resource) detail

variables.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.MAN_NAME
documentation: Management Node

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_hosts
documentation: Return an iterable of TI Hosts.
get nodes

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_hidden_hosts
documentation: Return a list of hidden TI Hosts.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_block_internet_hosts
documentation: Return a list of TI Hosts that has blocked access to the internet.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_routers
documentation: Return an iterable of TI Routers.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_node
documentation:
Return a TI virtual machine.

```
param name

The name of a TI virtual machine
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_nodes
documentation: Return an iterable of TI virtual machines.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_nodes_without_man
documentation: Return a list of TI virtual machines without Management Access Node (MAN).

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_visible_hosts
documentation:
Return a list of TI virtual machines that are not hidden directly
or through their network.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_visible_routers
documentation: Return a list of TI routers that are not hidden.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_hosts_networks
documentation: Return an iterable of TI user-defined Networks.
get networks

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_monitored_hosts
documentation:
Return a list of monitored hosts and their monitored
interfaces/ports.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_user_accessible_hosts_networks
documentation: Return a list of TI user-defined Networks that are accessible to a user.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_network
documentation:
Return a TI virtual network.

```
param name

The name of a TI virtual network
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_networks
documentation: Return an iterable of TI virtual networks.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_visible_networks
documentation: Retrun a list of TI networks that are not hidden, and their router is not hidden.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_node_links
documentation:
Return a list of Links associated with a given node.

Optionally specify networks for which the links must be also associated.
    Think of it as a filter.
get links

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_network_links
documentation:
Return a list of Links associated with a given network.

Optionally specify nodes for which the links must be also associated.
    Think of it as a filter.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_link_between_node_and_network
documentation: Return a Link associated with given server and network.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_network_default_gateway_link
documentation: Return a default gateway Link of the given network.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_links
documentation: Return an iterable of Links.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_links_from_wan_to_routers
documentation: Return a list of Links between routers and WAN

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_links_to_user_accessible_nodes
documentation: Return a list of Links between user-accessible networks and its nodes

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_node_to_nodes_link_pairs
documentation:
Return a list of NodeToNodeLinkPairs starting from a node to all other nodes
    only over networks adjacent to the starting node.

Optionally filter links by specifying the list of relevant target nodes
    and/or the list of relevant adjacent networks of the starting node.
get link pairs

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_link_pairs_man_to_nodes_over_management_network
documentation:
Return a list of NodeToNodeLinkPairs starting from Management Access Node (MAN)
    and ending at the Nodes over management network.

A list of NodeToNodeLinkPairs MAN <-> management Network <-> Router/Host

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.get_groups
documentation: Return an iterable of Host groups defined in TopologyDefinition.
get groups

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance.__str__
documentation: special and protected methods

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance._create_extra_nodes_links
documentation:
Create Links for an extra virtual machines of a TI.

This method should be called only once and within the __init__ method.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance._create_hosts_links
documentation:
Create Links for Host machines of a TI.

This method should be called only once and within the __init__ method.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance._create_routers_links
documentation:
Create Links for Router machines of a TI.

This method should be called only once and within the __init__ method.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance._get_free_ip_address
documentation: Return a free IP address from given network.

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.topology_instance.TopologyInstance._add_link
documentation: Create and add Link amongst TI links.
Represents a topology instance.

classes.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_private_ip
documentation:
Get IP address of a Terraform instance.

```
param instance_attrs

Terraform instance attributes

return

IP address
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_terraform_provider
documentation:
Get OpenStack Terraform provider
\:return: Terraform provider template
\:raise InvalidTopologyDefinition: Terraform provider template is incorrect

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.create_terraform_template
documentation:
Create terraform template that will be deployed.

```
param topology_instance

TopologyInstance used to create template

keyword key_pair_name_ssh

The name of SSH key pair in the cloud

keyword key_pair_name_cert

The name of certificate key pair in the cloud

keyword resource_prefix

The prefix of all resources

return

Terraform template as a string

raise KypoException

Network validation error

raise InvalidTopologyDefinition

Template rendering error
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.list_images
documentation:
List all available images on the cloud project.

```
return

List of Image objects.
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_image
documentation:
Get Image object based on its ID.

```
param image_id

The ID of image on the cloud

return

Image object
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.resume_node
documentation:
Resume node.

```
param node_id

The ID of the node

return

None

raise KypoException

Node not found
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.start_node
documentation:
Start node.

```
param node_id

The ID of the node

return

None

raise KypoException

Node not found
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.reboot_node
documentation:
Reboot node.

```
param node_id

The ID of the node

return

None

raise KypoException

Node not found
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_node_details
documentation:
Get node details from the Terraform resource attributes.
Note, Terraform attributes are backend specific.

```
param terraform_attrs

Terraform resource attributes of the node

return

Node details
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_console_url
documentation:
Get console for given node.

```
param node_id

The ID of the node

param console_type

Type can be novnc, xvpvnc, spice-html5, rdp-html5, serial and webmks

return

Console url

raise KypoException

Node not found
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.create_keypair
documentation:
Create key pair in cloud.

```
param name

Name of the key pair

param public_key

SSH public key or certificate, it None new is created

param key_type

Accepted vales are 'ssh' and 'x509'. Is used as suffix to 'name' parameter

return

None

raise KypoException

Creation failure
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_keypair
documentation:
Get KeyPair instance from cloud.

```
param name

The name of key pair

return

KeyPair instance

raise KypoException

Key pair does not exist
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.delete_keypair
documentation:
Delete key pair.

```
param name

The name of key pair

return

None

raise KypoException

Key pair does not exist
```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_quota_set
documentation:

```
return

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_project_name

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_hardware_usage
documentation:
Get hardware usage of a single sandbox.

```
param topology_instance

Topology instance from which the sandbox is created

```

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_flavors_dict
documentation:
Gets flavors defined in OpenStack project with their vcpu and ram usage as dictionary

```
return

flavors dictionary

methods.name: cyberrangecz.cloud_commons.cloud_client_base.KypoCloudClientBase.get_project_limits

Base class for KYPO cloud clients.
